kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Eastcheap and Southgate, one goes with Godfrey and the other with Rowan.
Exactly one member of the Joiners' Guild goes with (11 coins or 15 coins).
Exactly one of these is true: Matilda goes with Millpond; Tanner goes with Eastcheap; Southgate goes with 13 coins.
Bridgegate goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Blacksmith, and 13 coins.
Oldwall goes with exactly two of Matilda, Mason, and 19 coins.
If either Oldwall does not go with Mason or Fletcher goes with 13 coins, then Riverside goes with 13 coins.
Eastcheap, Riverside, and Southgate go with Godfrey, Rowan, and 15 coins, in some order.
Either Edmund goes with 9 coins or someone in the River Ward goes with Godfrey (but not both).

Either Edmund goes with 19 coins or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Aldric (but not both).
